title: Enforcement
doc_html:
§201.10. Enforcement

            The provisions of R.S. 45:201.5 through 201.9 may be enforced by appropriate civil remedy in any court of competent jurisdiction by any governmental authority.

            Acts 2015, No. 266, §1, eff. June 29, 2015.
doc_text:
§201.10.  Enforcement
The provisions of R.S. 45:201.5 through 201.9 may be enforced by appropriate civil
remedy in any court of competent jurisdiction by any governmental authority.
Acts 2015, No. 266, §1, eff. June 29, 2015.
